commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a4fe87da9c7f051a59e9d0f229785bb658038494)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an optional compaction retry heartbeat callback with helper coverage, edits `CHANGELOG.md`, and broadens code-mode QuickJS interrupted-error matching.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +7, Docs +1. Total +20 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection, but not by live runtime proof. Current main extends active compaction retry waits without refreshing `run.progress`, while stuck-session recovery can reclaim active work after stale progress.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because contributor-side runtime proof cannot be supplied by repair automation, and maintainers need the branch cleaned or split before merge.

target.title: fix(embedded-runner): refresh compaction retry diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Refresh diagnostic run progress while active compaction retries keep an embedded run waiting.
- Preserve the aggregate timeout fallback for idle/lost compaction retry waits.
- Add regression coverage for the compaction retry heartbeat path.

Replaces #76657 with a clean branch that only contains the embedded-runner heartbeat fix, focused tests, and the changelog entry.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Active compaction retry waits should keep refreshing diagnostic activity so long-running embedded work is not misclassified as stuck while compaction is still in flight.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw setup on Windows 11, source checkout at `D:\Projects\openclaw`, branch `fix/stuck-task-heartbeat-clean`, running with Node v24.14.0 and Corepack pnpm v10.33.3.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: From `D:\Projects\openclaw`, run `corepack pnpm --dir D:\Projects\openclaw test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/compaction-retry-aggregate-timeout.test.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stuck-session-recovery.runtime.test.ts`, then inspect the copied live terminal output from that local OpenClaw run.
Evidence after fix: Copied live terminal output from the local OpenClaw setup after the patch:
```text
> openclaw@2026.5.25 test D:\Projects\openclaw
> node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/compaction-retry-aggregate-timeout.test.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stuck-session-recovery.runtime.test.ts

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.logging.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 D:/Projects/openclaw

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  20 passed (20)
   Start at  00:05:07
   Duration  950ms (transform 618ms, setup 466ms, import 66ms, tests 126ms, environment 0ms)

[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.7 D:/Projects/openclaw

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  7 passed (7)
   Start at  00:05:11
   Duration  939ms (transform 575ms, setup 509ms, import 15ms, tests 116ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 10.98s
```
Observed result after fix: The diagnostic stuck-session recovery runtime suite passed, and the compaction retry aggregate-timeout suite passed with the updated in-flight compaction scenario proving `onHeartbeat` fires twice while compaction remains active before the retry resolves.
What was not tested: I did not run a full end-to-end embedded compaction retry session recording in a live channel.

## Test plan

- [x] `git diff --check`
- [x] `corepack pnpm --dir D:\Projects\openclaw test src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/compaction-retry-aggregate-timeout.test.ts src/logging/diagnostic-stuck-session-recovery.runtime.test.ts`
target.author: fangkaigedaima
